DEPT 4, JUDGE VON BEROLDINGEN, AGONZALES, REPORTER, GGOROSIN, CLERK THIS CASE WAS CONT'D FOR SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE TO 7/30/97 BEFORE JUDGE VON BEROLDINGEN. PLTF & PLTF'S COUNSEL DID NOT APPEAR AND NO CAUSE GIVEN. DEFT'S COUNSEL APPEARED. IN VIEW OF PLTF AND HIS COUNSEL'S FAILURE TO APPEAR, AN OSC WAS ISSUED AGAINST PLTF. & COUNSEL SET FOR 8/6/97 IN DEPT 4 AT 2PM. JURY TRIAL OF 8/6/97 VACATED AND WILL BE CONT'D TO A DATE TO BE COURT ORDERED ON 8/6/97 IN DEPT. 4.

JUDGE RYAN, DCOSTELLO, REPORTER, GGOROSIN, CLERK. JURY TRIAL CONT'D FROM 8/22/97. ALL OPRTIES, COUNSEL PRESENT AND 12 JURORS AND 1 ALTERNATE PRESENT AND SEATED IN THE JURY BOX. CLOSING ARGUMENTS, COURT INSTRUCTS JURY ON THE LAW OF THE CASE. BAILIFF SWORN, JURY RETIRED TO THE JURY ROOM TO DELIBERATE. JURY RETURNED TO COURT HOPELESSLY DEADLOCKED. COURT DECLARED A MISTRIAL. JURY DISCHARGED, THANKED AND EXCUSED, REMAINDER OF JURY DUTY EXCUSED BY JUDGE RYAN. ALL EXHIBITS AND DEPOSITIONS RETURNED TO RESPECTIVE COUNSEL. CASE CONT'D TO DEPT 1 8/26/97 AT 9:00 AM TO SET.
